entry.title: I just realised how weird my life is
entry.content: I just realised how weird my life is

entry.title: Thank you guys for sticking by me through all of my hair changes in the last year!!! Boy there were some doozies! Now I know for CERTAIN that natural is always best. But I believe that sometimes you’re gotta live and learn 🩷🩷
entry.content: Thank you guys for sticking by me through all of my hair changes in the last year!!! Boy there were some doozies! Now I know for CERTAIN that natural is always best. But I believe that sometimes you’re gotta live and learn 🩷🩷

entry.title: I’m taking a break from giving birth for now ☺️
entry.content: I’m taking a break from giving birth for now ☺️

entry.title: Let’s normalise putting in effort. Australia needs it. The way some of yall be leaving the house 🙅🏼‍♀️
entry.content: Let’s normalise putting in effort. Australia needs it. The way some of yall be leaving the house 🙅🏼‍♀️

entry.title: If you can love us in private, but you can’t defend us publicly… WE DON’T WANT YOU! Ladies, I know some of y’all be settling for these kinda men. Knock it off! You deserve so much better 😙🏳️‍⚧️
entry.content: If you can love us in private, but you can’t defend us publicly… WE DON’T WANT YOU! Ladies, I know some of y’all be settling for these kinda men. Knock it off! You deserve so much better 😙🏳️‍⚧️

entry.content: #stitch with @Mikaela Testa had to respond to this as soon as I saw it

entry.title: Persephone is very scared. She has come from horrible living conditions where she even got Giardia due to neglect. Shes all healed now and ready to join my squad 🐱
entry.content: Persephone is very scared. She has come from horrible living conditions where she even got Giardia due to neglect. Shes all healed now and ready to join my squad 🐱

entry.title: Replying to @69ninjaturtle1 Many years ago the goal was to make people believe that I am a woman. As I’ve grown older I’ve really had to let go of that. It’s a fight that I will never win. Now all I care about is living a life that fulfills me. Surround y
entry.content: Replying to @69ninjaturtle1 Many years ago the goal was to make people believe that I am a woman. As I’ve grown older I’ve really had to let go of that. It’s a fight that I will never win. Now all I care about is living a life that fulfills me. Surround y

entry.title: How do i teach her that the litter box isnt a bed???
entry.content: How do i teach her that the litter box isnt a bed???

entry.title: There was a time where i used to ‘hunt’ men. All it got me was a broken heart and time ill never get back. Women were not made to hunt, men were, so let them. They enjoy it, we don’t.
entry.content: There was a time where i used to ‘hunt’ men. All it got me was a broken heart and time ill never get back. Women were not made to hunt, men were, so let them. They enjoy it, we don’t.
